scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && rsync -av --exclude='dist' --exclude='node_modules' --exclude='.git' --exclude='replace.js' --exclude='fix_links.js' --exclude='fix_newlines.js' --exclude='update_site.js' --exclude='add_new_pages.js' --exclude='add_remaining_pages.js' --exclude='pull_request_23_status.txt' . dist/ && html-minifier --input-dir dist --output-dir dist --collapse-whitespace --remove-comments --minify-css true --minify-js true --file-ext html && cleancss -o dist/styles.css dist/styles.css
